accesskit_investigation_2026_03_23.status: COMPLETE PICTURE: (1) AccessTree/FocusManager data structures fully implemented in accessibility.rs with tests. (2) DrawContext.with_accessibility() constructor exists. (3) accesskit_winit = '0.32' already declared in crates/motif/Cargo.toml — zero new deps needed. (4) No .rs file in crates/motif/ imports accesskit_winit. Integration gap: ~30 lines in examples — add accesskit_winit::Adapter to App struct, call Adapter::new(window, initial_tree) in resumed(), forward UserEvent to adapter in window_event(), call adapter.update_if_active(|| tree_update) after each draw.

renderer_trait_investigation_2026_03_23.status: DONE — Renderer trait in crates/motif_core/src/renderer.rs is fully implemented. Has 'type Surface' associated type and 'fn render(&mut self, scene: &Scene, surface: &mut Self::Surface)'. MetalRenderer implements it with Surface = MetalSurface. DebugRenderer implements it with Surface = (). 'Abstract renderer trait' TODO in cross-platform section is COMPLETE. Remaining cross-platform work is wgpu backend: research wgpu surface/device API to see how it fits the Renderer trait interface.
